'''Mumunubb''' was an [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Sullust (star)|Sullust]] in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]]. Located in the [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it shared the fifth orbit with [[Munumubb]].

*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
